text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I didn't hold anything back and I thought I had it,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. You're right, it wasn't a bad result at
all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! It's time to start fresh! I'll get even better
and win my next race!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Right! I'll use this disappointment as motivation
for my training!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
First place will be mine next time, Trainer! Just
you watch!
